data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. UNWOKE should relish stepping up to a middle distance for the first time, and she has no problem with a wet track. She will have ample time to find a good spot from her tricky gate, and with Tina Comignaghi keeping the faith, she is the one to beat for ours. 7. PRIVATE TREATY got to be within a nose of breaking through for an overdue maiden win here 2 weeks ago, and she has not missed a placing in 5 starts over this trip. She is set to go one better here. 6. SAILOR SAM ran his best race to date when stepping up to this trip and finishing third in the same race as the second pick. He carries a kilo less this time, and he should be a top 3 hope again. 9. THE BOSS GIRLS has been freshened a touch, and she has always promised to win a race. She is getting stronger all the time, and an extra 200m will suit her. Include in all top 4 combos. 8. GOLDEN LINING can be a touch one-paced, but this field is not strong, so include her in all top 4 combos to be safe.","runners":[1,7,6,9,8],"exclusive":true}
